unit.title: FC-LS Fabric Login / FLOGI
unit.notes: Seed reading plan derived from FLOGI live QA traces. The plan intentionally decomposes the broad FLOGI question into focused, IR-oriented tasks.

task.title: FLOGI request, responses, retry branches, and completion
task.reading_goal: Read the Fabric Login procedure end to end: request setup, S_ID/D_ID/OX_ID rules, LS_ACC Fabric path, point-to-point LS_ACC path, F_BSY/P_BSY/F_RJT/P_RJT/LS_RJT/no-response/self-connection branches, SOF/Class constraints, and Originator/Responder completion conditions.
completion_criteria: Every response branch on pages 154-155 is represented.
Retry behavior for Class not supported, Invalid S_ID, LS_RJT, and no response is represented.
All Class 1/2/3 Originator and Responder completion conditions are represented.
SOFc1/SOFi1 and Class 6 constraints are represented.
